hits.name: Cement II Polished Porcelain Tile
hits.long_description:
Cement II Polished Porcelain Tile by Pianetto offers a sophisticated and modern cement look, perfect for enhancing any residential or light commercial space. This 24 x 24 tile is designed for both floor and wall applications, delivering a seamless and polished finish that transforms your kitchen or bathroom into a stylish haven.

  • The rectified edge ensures precise alignment and minimal grout lines, resulting in a sleek and professional appearance.
  • A polished finish adds elegance and reflects light beautifully, enhancing the overall ambiance of your space.
  • Suitable for installation on both floors and walls, providing flexibility to create cohesive designs throughout your home.
  • Designed exclusively for indoor use, making it ideal for kitchens, bathrooms, and living areas where durability is required.
  • Waterproof construction ensures long-lasting performance in wet areas, protecting your investment from water damage.

With its gray color and square shape, Cement II Polished Porcelain Tile delivers a contemporary cement look that complements various interior styles. Measuring 9mm in thickness, this tile is perfect for creating a durable yet stylish environment in any room.
hits.pageDescription: Discover our stunning Cement II Polished Porcelain Tile. High gloss finish, realistic design, made in the USA. Elevate your space now!
hits.pageTitle: Cement II Polished Porcelain Tile - Gray Tile | Floor and Decor

hits.name: Zellige Oat Ceramic Tile
hits.long_description:
The Zellige Oat Ceramic Tile by Villa is a stunning rectangular wall tile measuring 2 1/2 x 8 inches. This artisanal tile offers a unique, handcrafted look with its high gloss finish and uneven edges, making it perfect for adding character to any space. Each tile is unique from tile to tile, ensuring a truly bespoke design.

  • The pressed edges provide a clean and precise installation, enhancing the overall aesthetic of your space.
  • The high gloss finish adds a luxurious shine that makes your bathroom or kitchen backsplash stand out.
  • With its handmade look, each tile boasts unique variations in color and texture for an artisanal feel.
  • Ideal for wall installations only, making it perfect for accent walls in kitchens and bathrooms.
  • Suitable for indoor use, allowing you to create beautiful interiors with confidence.
  • Safe for shower walls, making it an excellent choice for creating stunning shower surrounds.

Available in a natural color, the Zellige Oat Ceramic Tile is perfect for adding warmth and elegance to any room. Its handcrafted look and unique variations ensure that your design will be one of a kind.

__primary_category.2: Decoratives > Shop By Material > Porcelain & Ceramic

hits.name: Artisan Frost Ceramic Tile
hits.long_description:
The Artisan Frost Ceramic Tile by Villa offers a stunning solution for your residential spaces. Crafted with a handmade look, this high gloss tile is perfect for adding a touch of elegance to your home, particularly in areas like the kitchen and bathroom.

  • The chiseled or tumbled edge provides a rustic charm and adds character to any wall installation.
  • A high gloss finish ensures easy cleaning and maintenance while enhancing the tiles reflective quality.
  • The handmade look style family brings an artisanal, unique feel to your walls, making each piece stand out.
  • Suitable for wall installations only, making it ideal for backsplashes or feature walls in kitchens and bathrooms.
  • Safe for shower walls, allowing you to create beautiful and durable bathroom designs.

Available in white color, the 3 x 12 rectangular shape of the Artisan Frost Ceramic Tile makes it versatile for various design layouts. This water-resistant tile is perfect for indoor use, ensuring longevity and beauty in any residential space.
hits.pageDescription: Discover the stylish Artisan Frost Ceramic Tile. Perfect for any space, its easy installation & maintenance make it a top choice. Upgrade your space today!
hits.pageTitle: Artisan Frost White Ceramic Tile | Floor and Decor

hits.name: Luxe Sand Matte Porcelain Tile
hits.long_description:
Luxe Sand Matte Porcelain Tile by Vetta Elements is the perfect choice for those seeking elegance and durability in their home or commercial space. This versatile tile is suitable for both indoor and outdoor use, making it an excellent option for various applications, including floors and walls.

  • Featuring a rectified edge, this tile ensures a smooth, seamless finish that enhances the overall aesthetic of any room.
  • The matte finish provides a modern, sophisticated look while offering a slip-resistant surface for added safety.
  • Ideal for floor and wall installations, this tile offers flexibility in design and application, allowing you to create cohesive spaces.
  • With its waterproof nature, this tile is perfect for areas prone to moisture, such as kitchens and bathrooms.
  • Safe for shower floors and walls, this tile allows you to maintain a consistent design throughout your bathroom.

Available in an elegant ivory color with a cement look style family, Luxe Sand Matte Porcelain Tile comes in a 12 x 24 nominal size description. Its matte surface texture adds to its contemporary appeal while ensuring easy maintenance. Upgrade your space with the timeless beauty and practicality of Luxe Sand Matte Porcelain Tile.

hits.name: Phoenix Sand Matte Porcelain Tile
hits.long_description:
Phoenix Sand Matte Porcelain Tile is a versatile and stylish choice for your home or commercial space. This beautiful beige tile offers durability and elegance, making it suitable for various applications in both indoor and outdoor settings, including kitchens and bathrooms.

  • The straight or rectified edge ensures a seamless look, adding sophistication to any room.
  • The matte finish provides a modern, understated elegance while being easy to clean and maintain.
  • Ideal for installation on floors and walls, offering flexibility in design options.
  • Suitable for both indoor and outdoor use, enhancing any area with its timeless appeal.
  • Waterproof feature makes it perfect for wet areas like bathrooms and kitchens, ensuring longevity.
  • Safe for shower floors, providing a durable surface that withstands moisture.
  • Perfect for shower walls, creating a cohesive and stylish bathroom design.

With its beige color, rectangular shape, and matte finish, Phoenix Sand Matte Porcelain Tile offers a contemporary look that complements any decor. Measuring 12 x 24 inches with a thickness of 9MM, this tile is designed to last while providing an elegant touch to your space.
hits.pageDescription: Experience the durability & charm of Phoenix Sand Porcelain Tile. An affordable yet luxurious stone-look alternative. Buy now for an instant room upgrade!
hits.pageTitle: Phoenix Sand Porcelain Tile - Beige Tile | Floor and Decor
